roles.notes: Mobile Eats has no owner/operator, operating-control handoff, coach-role agreement, majority-stake receipt, or owner operating-control acknowledgement.

notes: This ledger is the mechanical gate for Joshua retaining coach role and majority stake while the owner receives operating control.
It is separate from peer-coach eligibility, which applies to graduated Tier 2+ owners coaching future companies.
This is a receipt gate, not legal or tax advice.
